INTRODUCTION   In the annals of investing, Warren Buffett stands alone. Starting from scratch, simply by picking stocks and companies for investment, Buffett amassed one of the epochal fortunes of the twentieth century.
best_excerpt: His policy is to disclose what he will about the company and let trading follow its course.  But the obsession with Buffett’s longevity is one that Buffett, though for different reasons, feels more keenly than anyone.
